checks.describe: the Zot registry service is reachable on localhost:5100 and speaks the OCI catalog API (Step 1). Self-seeds by starting the registry service via compose if it is down
checks.run: bash labs/m7/seed.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; if curl -fsS http://localhost:5100/v2/_catalog | grep -q 'repositories'; then echo registry-up; else echo registry-down; fi

checks.describe: the model Kitfile uses RELATIVE paths (absolute paths are rejected by kit) and packs three layers — model, datasets, code (Step 2)
checks.run: F=labs/opsmate/Kitfile; if [ -s "$F" ] && grep -q 'path: models/gguf/' "$F" && grep -q 'path: evals/golden.yaml' "$F" && grep -q 'path: prompts' "$F" && ! grep -qE 'path: /' "$F"; then echo kitfile-relative; else echo kitfile-bad; fi

checks.describe: both tags are in the registry — the shipped base 1.0.0 AND the recorded M6 candidate 1.0.0-candidate (Step 3, the two-tags story). Self-seeds the packs/pushes
checks.run: bash labs/m7/seed.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; T=$(curl -fsS http://localhost:5100/v2/opsmate/model/tags/list 2>/dev/null); if echo "$T" | grep -q '"1.0.0"' && echo "$T" | grep -q '1.0.0-candidate'; then echo two-tags; else echo tags-missing; fi

checks.describe: the model kit's model layer is the heavy crate — hundreds of MB (the 610 MB GGUF), read from the real manifest (Step 3, layer sizes)
checks.run: bash labs/m7/seed.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; SZ=$(curl -fsS -H 'Accept: application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json' http://localhost:5100/v2/opsmate/model/manifests/1.0.0 | jq '[.layers[].size] | max' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$SZ" ] && [ "$SZ" -gt 100000000 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo model-layer-large; else echo model-layer-small; fi

checks.describe: the adapter kit exists and is tiny next to the model kit — the adapters-travel-light point (Step 4). Skips gracefully if M6 artifacts are absent
checks.run: bash labs/m7/seed.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; if ! curl -fsS http://localhost:5100/v2/opsmate/adapter/tags/list 2>/dev/null | grep -q '1.0.0'; then echo adapter-skipped-no-m6; else SZ=$(curl -fsS -H 'Accept: application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json' http://localhost:5100/v2/opsmate/adapter/manifests/1.0.0 | jq '[.layers[].size] | add' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$SZ" ] && [ "$SZ" -lt 50000000 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo adapter-tiny; else echo adapter-odd; fi; fi

checks.describe: selective unpack (--filter=code) pulls ONLY the prompts layer, not the 610 MB model — the take-one-crate lesson (Step 5)
checks.run: bash labs/m7/seed.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; D=$(mktemp -d); kit unpack localhost:5100/opsmate/model:1.0.0 --filter=code -d "$D" --plain-http >/dev/null 2>&1; HAS_PROMPTS=$(find "$D" -name 'system.txt' | head -1); HAS_GGUF=$(find "$D" -name '*.gguf' | head -1); rm -rf "$D"; if [ -n "$HAS_PROMPTS" ] && [ -z "$HAS_GGUF" ]; then echo code-only; else echo unpack-wrong; fi

checks.describe: the base 1.0.0 is signed and cosign verifies it by digest — the wax seal, cleared to deploy (Step 6). Self-seeds keys + sign
checks.run: bash labs/m7/seed.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; D=$(curl -sI -H 'Accept: application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json' http://localhost:5100/v2/opsmate/model/manifests/1.0.0 | awk 'tolower($1)=="docker-content-digest:"{print $2}' | tr -d '\r'); if cosign verify --key labs/opsmate/signing/cosign.pub --allow-insecure-registry --insecure-ignore-tlog "localhost:5100/opsmate/model@$D" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo base-signed; else echo base-unsigned; fi

checks.describe: the candidate 1.0.0-candidate is deliberately UNSIGNED — verifying it FAILS, which is the gate story (Step 6). Skips if M6 candidate is absent
checks.run: bash labs/m7/seed.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; if ! curl -fsS http://localhost:5100/v2/opsmate/model/tags/list 2>/dev/null | grep -q '1.0.0-candidate'; then echo candidate-skipped-no-m6; else D=$(curl -sI -H 'Accept: application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json' http://localhost:5100/v2/opsmate/model/manifests/1.0.0-candidate | awk 'tolower($1)=="docker-content-digest:"{print $2}' | tr -d '\r'); if cosign verify --key labs/opsmate/signing/cosign.pub --allow-insecure-registry --insecure-ignore-tlog "localhost:5100/opsmate/model@$D" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo candidate-signed-unexpected; else echo candidate-unsigned; fi; fi

checks.describe: the preflight has the optional VERIFY_SIGNATURE gate that cosign-verifies before serving — the verify-before-deploy hook (Step 7)
checks.run: F=labs/opsmate/preflight.sh; if grep -q 'VERIFY_SIGNATURE' "$F" && grep -q 'cosign verify' "$F"; then echo gate-present; else echo gate-missing; fi

checks.describe: the compose spine grew a registry service (Zot) — arch-parameterised image, port 5100, persisted volume (Step 1)
checks.run: F=labs/opsmate/compose.yaml; if grep -q 'registry:' "$F" && grep -q 'zot-linux' "$F" && grep -q '5100:5000' "$F"; then echo registry-service; else echo registry-service-missing; fi
